name: Chicken with Goat Cheese
recipeIngredient: 4 Boneless, skinless chicken breasts, pounded to 1/4 inch
1 tbsp Minced sun-dried tomatoes (soaked in hot water, drained)
1/2 cup Cracker crumbs seasoned with 1/2 tsp dried basil, crushed
1 1/4 cup Roasted Red Pepper Wine Sauce
Fresh basil leaves OR parsley for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the goat cheese, chopped basil, thyme, sun-dried tomatoes (soaked in hot water and drained), olive oil.
2. Divide the mixture into four equal portions and form small logs. Place one log of goat cheese on each flattened chicken breast and roll up the chicken around the cheese. Dip each rolled chicken in beaten egg white and then roll in seasoned cracker crumbs.
3. Place seam-side down in a baking dish with lid; cover. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 20 minutes.
4. Remove the lid, increase the oven temperature to 450°F, and bake an additional 10 minutes.
5. To serve, cut each chicken breast into four slices and spoon roasted red pepper wine sauce over top. Garnish with fresh basil or parsley.
